_source: Canonical: research/content-license-rubric/RUBRIC.md 'Green allow-list'. Single source of truth for the green-license gate — BOTH backend/src/license.ts and backend/scripts/seed_catalog.py read THIS file. Do not hardcode the list in either. Eval: uppercase+trim the id; reject if it contains any excludeIfContains token; else green if it's in `exact` or matches any `patterns` regex.
